name: Video Prompt Quality
description: Evaluates the quality of video/motion prompts from the video prompt phase.

dimensions.name: motion_description
dimensions.criteria: Do video prompts describe specific, filmable motion? Are camera movements and subject actions clearly specified?

scoringGuide.excellent: Clear, specific motion descriptions with camera movements, subject actions, and timing. Ready for video generation.
scoringGuide.good: Good motion descriptions for most clips. Some lack specificity.
scoringGuide.adequate: Basic motion described but mostly static or vague.
scoringGuide.poor: No meaningful motion description. Would produce essentially static video.

dimensions.name: continuity
dimensions.criteria: Do video prompts maintain visual continuity between clips? Would sequential clips feel connected?

scoringGuide.excellent: Perfect continuity. Each clip leads naturally into the next.
scoringGuide.good: Good continuity for most transitions. Minor visual jumps.
scoringGuide.adequate: Some continuity breaks but overall watchable.
scoringGuide.poor: Clips feel disconnected. No sense of visual continuity.

dimensions.name: pacing
dimensions.criteria: Is the pacing appropriate? Do video prompts suggest appropriate durations and rhythm for the narrative?

scoringGuide.excellent: Pacing matches the narrative perfectly. Action scenes feel dynamic, quiet moments feel contemplative.
scoringGuide.good: Mostly appropriate pacing. Minor rhythm issues.
scoringGuide.adequate: Functional pacing but feels uniform or mismatched to narrative.
scoringGuide.poor: Pacing is off. All clips same length or mismatched to content.
